creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 236733
grafana7.diff

There're at least three vulnerabilities (two critical and one moderate) in the port. There aren't fixes by upsream. Last version (7.5.16) has been released on on May 19, 2022. Current port version (7.5.15) has been released on Jan 25, 2022.

I think the port should be marked as deprecated.

Details:
- 7.x branch is deprecated upstream
- Has unfixed vulnerabilities
- grafana8 and grafana9 are available as replacements
- no consumers of grafana7 in the ports tree

Security:
CVE-2022-31107
CVE-2022-31176
CVE-2022-35957
